examples: Does not rely entirely on the MHC.
It's not that certain MHC genes smell better to women — it's the difference that counts.
In addition to the MHC, this region on chromosome 6 also contains a cluster of histone genes.
That means people are able to sniff out suitable MHC genomes in prospective partners.
The correlation is with the genes of what is known as the major histocompatibility complex (MHC).
